current_storage: Open poly sacks in mud store

assessment.risk: HIGH — moisture above safe 13%. Aflatoxin risk within 2 weeks.
assessment.recommendation: Dry immediately on tarpaulin for 3-5 days. Target moisture below 13% before bagging. Use hermetic bags (PICS bags) if available.
assessment.sell_or_store: Store after drying — price expected +15% in 6 weeks based on seasonal trend.

assessment.risk: CRITICAL — tomato has 3-5 day shelf life unrefrigerated. Price at Lagos is NGN 450 but transport takes 14 hours.
assessment.recommendation: Sell immediately at Kaduna market OR contact tomato paste processor Dangote Tomato Factory (Kaduna). Do not attempt Lagos.
assessment.sell_or_store: Sell within 48 hours. Local price (NGN 430) is better than risk of transport loss.

matched_buyers.requirement: Ripe grade, delivered to factory gate

current_storage: Metal silo (200kg capacity x6), rest in sacks

assessment.risk: LOW — moisture is within safe range. Silo portion secure. Sacks at moderate risk from weevils.
assessment.recommendation: Treat sacked portion with Actellic 2% dust (1kg per tonne). Keep off ground on pallets. Inspect monthly.
assessment.sell_or_store: STORE — price trend is upward (+19% over 30 days). Recommend selling 40% now to cover immediate cash needs and holding 60% for 8 weeks.
